modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Smart AC adapter not functioning on HP laptop.

full_description_text: User reports issue with smart AC adapter. Laptop shows error message about adapter not working. User needs assistance to resolve this problem.
short_description: Smart AC adapter not functioning on HP laptop.
description: User reports issue with smart AC adapter. Laptop shows error message about adapter not working. User needs assistance to resolve this problem.
